# UC-14.10.7 · Aranet Battery Level Predictive Replacement Windows

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Capacity, Operations &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We track sensor batteries so they are replaced before they die.*

---

## Description

Wireless sensors fail when batteries fade; trending minima schedules bulk replacement before winter heating season.

## Value

Cuts emergency site visits and prevents data gaps during audits.

## Implementation

(1) Confirm percentage field. (2) Alert below 20%. (3) Export monthly work orders.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-60d
| eval batt=tonumber(coalesce(battery_pct, battery, ""))
| where isnotnull(batt)
| timechart span=1d min(batt) as min_battery_pct by sensor_id
```

## Visualization

Line per sensor; forecast optional.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
